message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in async_state_machine.zig, try_except.zig, analyzer.zig

async_state_machine.zig - findMutatedInNode:
- Add orelse_body for for_stmt/while_stmt
- Add try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt handlers

try_except.zig - findWrittenVarsInStmts:
- Add orelse_body for for_stmt/while_stmt
- Add with_stmt, match_stmt handlers

analyzer.zig - analyzeStmt:
- Add orelse_body for for_stmt/while_stmt
- Add else_body for try_stmt (was missing)
- Add with_stmt, match_stmt handlers
